title: Crash on SELECT with SERIAL aggregation and GROUP BY column alias's
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (a INTEGER, b VARCHAR(50), c INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY, d FLOAT CHECK (d >= 0));
INSERT INTO test1 (a, b, d) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', 20.0), (3, 'test3', NULL);
CREATE TABLE test2 (x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y INTEGER, z INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY);
SELECT a AS t, COUNT(DISTINCT c) FROM test1 GROUP BY t;
key_bug_features: SELECT with SERIAL aggregation and GROUP BY column alias
